<!--
In ODPM, a Pull Request is a Proposed Refinement of the ontology, and a
Merge is the moment the ontology is agreed. Fill what applies; delete
what doesn't.
-->

## What this refines

_What part of the ontology or the framework does this change?_

## Ontology impact

_Does this redefine any of the five building blocks?_

- [ ] Concept
- [ ] Relationship
- [ ] Rule
- [ ] State
- [ ] Action
- [ ] None — supporting change only (docs, structure, examples)

## Open questions resolved

_Link any Open Question issues this closes. If it opens new ones, link those too._

## Why this is ready to agree on

_Why is the team Decision Ready to merge this? What remaining unknowns, if any, are accepted rather than blocking?_
